summary: Frontend-only testing for Builder middle pane UX improvements. All 5 requested features verified: (1) Variable fields in middle pane only show placeholders that exist in raw template text - no stale extra fields, (2) No duplicate-like variable names found across 19 unique variable labels, (3) Text-based variable inputs are now larger (min-h-24/96px for text, min-h-32/128px for textarea) with resize-y for paragraph input, (4) Select and multiselect controls render and function correctly (4 selects, 7 multiselects tested), (5) Right-pane prompt output updates immediately when variable values change in middle pane.
critical_code_review_comments: SectionCard.jsx correctly derives visible variable keys from placeholders in raw text using extractVariableKeysFromText() and mergeVariableKeys()
Variable card layout improved with rounded-lg border and proper spacing (space-y-2)
Help text displayed separately below variable label when definition.label differs from key
Textarea inputs have appropriate min-height classes (min-h-24 for text, min-h-32 for textarea type) with resize-y for user resizing
seed_data_creation: None - used existing prompt 'Architecture Flow QA Prompt' for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Builder middle pane UX improvements verified. Key implementation: SectionCard.jsx uses extractVariableKeysFromText() to derive visible variable keys from raw_text placeholders, eliminating stale/extra variable fields. Text inputs use Textarea component with min-h-24 (96px) for text type and min-h-32 (128px) for textarea type, both with resize-y. Variable sync to prompt output works via compilePromptOutput() in promptBuilder.js. Select and multiselect controls render based on variable_definitions input_type.

variable_fields_match_placeholders.details: Raw text had 4 unique placeholders (agent_name, agent_role, agent_gender, agent_objective), section header showed '4 variables · 1 subsections' - exact match

no_duplicate_variable_names.details: All 19 variable labels are unique across all sections and subsections

larger_text_inputs.details: Text inputs have min-h-24 (96px), textarea inputs have min-h-32 (128px), both with resize-y for user resizing

select_multiselect_controls.details: 4 select controls and 7 multiselect containers found and functional

prompt_output_sync.details: Changed agent_name from 'Riya' to 'TestAgent123' - output updated immediately. Toggled multiselect checkbox - output updated to include 'Tamil/Tanglish'
